core_principles: Trust through clarity: Use crisp typography and generous whitespace.
Grounded aesthetics: Earthy off-whites combined with a vibrant, trustworthy light green.
Fusion of Forms: Combine the approachability of a D2C brand with the data density of an elite financial terminal.

surfaces_and_shadows.marketing_nav: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5. Ensures text is readable when scrolling.
surfaces_and_shadows.dashboard_cards: Flat solid: bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg. No heavy drop shadows.
surfaces_and_shadows.pricing_cards: The 'Tracing Beam' effect for the recommended tier, flat solid for others.

layout_grids.marketing: Tetris Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Heavy asymmetry. Never center-align everything.
layout_grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense, strict alignment. Every pixel utilized.

animation.marketing: Framer Motion staggered fade-ups for features. Smooth page transitions.
animation.dashboard: Minimal micro-interactions. Hover states lift cards by -translate-y-1 and change border color.

iconography.style: Clean, line-based, consistent stroke width (1.5px). Avoid filled icons unless active.

images.description: Wide-angle photograph of a young delivery rider. Use in the Landing Page Hero section with a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-stone-900/80 to-transparent) so text is perfectly readable.
Minimalist shield logo for the FleetLock brand. Can be used in navbars or footers.
Abstract topographic map. Use as a subtle background pattern for the Admin Zone Risk Map or Disruption Simulator sections.
Abstract glass cards. Use in the Insurance Plans or ML Model Insights section for premium visual flair.
Man riding a bike in the street. Use in the Worker Dashboard profile area, testimonial section, or About us section.

page_specific_instructions.landing_page: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layouts. Implement a massive sticky Crystal Glassmorphism header. Hero section must use the hero_background image with text-shadow for contrast. Include a marquee of text/values (Organic Editorial Ribbon style) instead of generic logos.
page_specific_instructions.worker_dashboard: Focus on the 'North Star Metric' (Earnings Baseline vs Payouts) in the top left. Use Shadcn components for tracking claims (timeline). The layout should be pure function, cardless aesthetic where possible, utilizing pure white surfaces on the off-white background.
page_specific_instructions.admin_dashboard: Dense data layout using the 'Control Room Grid'. Use Recharts for ML Model Insights (Fraud risk over time, Disruption severity). Incorporate the texture_map image behind the Zone Risk Map module. High contrast typography for data.
page_specific_instructions.insurance_plans: Highlight the 3 tiers: Sahara (Rs.29/day), Kavach (Rs.59/day), Suraksha (Rs.99/day). Use 'The Tracing Beam' effect on the recommended tier (Kavach or Suraksha) to draw attention. Provide clear progressive disclosure for feature lists.

testing_requirements: All interactive elements, buttons, and forms MUST include descriptive data-testid attributes.
